mapper.select:
SELECT R.RECIPE_ID, R.MEMBER_ID, R.TITLE, R.THUMBNAIL_URL, R.CREATED_AT, C.CATEGORY_NAME FROM RECIPE R LEFT JOIN RECIPE_CATEGORY C ON R.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID WHERE 1=1
AND R.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND R.CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY R.RECIPE_ID DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_RECIPE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO RECIPE ( RECIPE_ID, MEMBER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, TITLE, THUMBNAIL_URL ) VALUES ( #{recipeId}, #{memberId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{thumbnailUrl} )
INSERT INTO RECIPE_BLOCK ( BLOCK_ID, RECIPE_ID, BLOCK_TYPE, CONTENT, SORT_ORDER ) VALUES ( SEQ_RECIPE_BLOCK.NEXTVAL, #{recipeId}, #{blockType}, #{content}, #{sortOrder} )
mapper.select:
SELECT R.RECIPE_ID, R.MEMBER_ID, R.TITLE, R.CREATED_AT,
B.BLOCK_ID, B.BLOCK_TYPE, B.CONTENT, B.SORT_ORDER
FROM RECIPE R LEFT JOIN RECIPE_BLOCK B ON R.RECIPE_ID = B.RECIPE_ID WHERE R.RECIPE_ID = #{recipeId} ORDER BY B.SORT_ORDER
